controls.name: Task-scoped authority
controls.rule: Every agent receives an immutable task manifest and only its declared capabilities.

controls.name: No self-approval
controls.rule: An implementation agent cannot be the sole approving reviewer or merger.

controls.name: No acceptance-criteria mutation
controls.rule: Agents cannot weaken task acceptance criteria to fit implementation results.

controls.name: No validation bypass
controls.rule: Failing checks cannot be disabled or reclassified without separate reviewed governance.

controls.name: No production signing authority
controls.rule: Agents cannot access offline roots or production signing keys.

controls.name: No stable release promotion
controls.rule: Stable promotion requires designated human release authority.

controls.name: Scoped files
controls.rule: Write access is limited to declared repository paths.

controls.name: Scoped network
controls.rule: Outbound network is deny by default and allowlisted per task.

controls.name: Ephemeral credentials
controls.rule: Any credential is short lived, task scoped, auditable, and revoked after use.

controls.name: Run provenance
controls.rule: Material runs record model, prompts, tools, environment, commands, diff, tests, and review.

controls.name: Independent verification
controls.rule: Production-sensitive work receives verification independent from the authoring run.

controls.name: Embargo separation
controls.rule: Security findings use restricted providers, branches, logs, and participants.

controls.name: Resource budgets
controls.rule: Time, CPU, memory, disk, network, cost, workers, and retries are bounded.

controls.name: No hidden subagents
controls.rule: Subagents and external tools are declared and inherit no broader authority.

controls.name: Human escalation
controls.rule: Legal, release, signing, disclosure, unresolved security, and support decisions escalate.

controls.name: Untrusted repository input
controls.rule: Issues, files, tests, logs, and dependency docs cannot override governing instructions.

controls.name: Rollback
controls.rule: Every production task has a documented rollback or explicit irreversible review.

controls.name: Failure preservation
controls.rule: Retries preserve failed evidence and cannot cherry-pick a passing run.

controls.name: No fabricated evidence
controls.rule: Agents cannot synthesize benchmark, conformance, review, or support evidence.

controls.name: Authority expiry
controls.rule: Task authority terminates on completion, cancellation, timeout, or environment compromise.
